title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

reviews.title: nice but mouse dont work
reviews.text: it was pretty and bright but the mouse didn't work with my pc.

reviews.title: Complete JUNK----Don't waste your money
reviews.text: Button's Stick very bad mouse makes your characters run where ever they want too it only last a few months then its garbage

reviews.title: Beautiful
reviews.text: This is the most adorable keyboard. I love it for work and for gaming. It has a lovely feel to it and the colors are great! The only thing that i would change is the sound of the keys when you are typing as it is sort of loud. Sometimes when I am typing really fast I can not hear the other person on the phone speak.

reviews.title: Birthday gift
reviews.text: I got this to go with my sons new desktop that he got for his 10th birthday.  He absolutely loves it and has yet to have any issues.  Well worth the purchase.

reviews.title: stopped working after a few months
reviews.text: love the keyboard, only reason for the bad review is that the mouse stopped working less than 6 months after i bought it, tried to get a hold of them but they dont have any sort of contact so now i have to get a new mouse

title: Redragon K556 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard M612 Wired Gaming Mouse Bundle
features: This bundle includes a K556 gaming keyboard and a M612 Mouse.

K556 Keyboard: The mechanical brown switch offers the best tactile typing experience, also being ever so slightly quieter, fitting for office or gaming use. And you will get 8 spared switches as a gift.

K556 Keyboard: RGB LED adjustable lighting with 6-themed backlights -18 lighting models. You can also adjust their brightness with FN+“↑”and“↓” Besides, there is a 9-color single backlit mode for this keyboard.

M612 Mouse: Pentakill, 5 DPI Levels - Geared with 5 redefinable DPI levels (default as: 500/1000/2000/3000/4000), easy to switch between different game needs. Dedicated demand of DPI options between 500-8000 is also available to be processed by software.

M612 Mouse: Any Button is Reassignable - 11 programmable buttons are all editable with customizable tactical keybinds in whatever game or work you are engaging. 1 rapid fire + 2 side macro buttons offer you a better gaming and working experience.

reviews.title: Small kickstands
reviews.text: The kickstands or keyboard legs are short so even when they are up, keyboard still feels pretty small. Other than that, really good keyboard.

title: ASCENY Coiled & Double-Sleeved Mechanical Keyboard Cable, for Type-C Mechanical Keyboards (Purple)
description: As MK enthusiasts who are obsessed with building keyboards, we understood the needs of the mechanical keyboards community. This cable is our latest take on designed mechanical keyboard cables. Our goal was to create a mass production product that will allow more people to get into the hobby without having to spend a huge amount of money. After many failed attempts to make a great coil in mass production, we finally believe that we have created a great product that stands in one with the standards of mechanical keyboard enthusiasts.
features: Stiff plastic injected Asceny connectors. No more amateurish heatshrinks.
PET double sleeve that gives a beautiful texture, and extra durability.
4.9ft long (excluding the coil length) & Super flexible 6" tight coil that lasts.
Comes in a beautiful package that holds the coil tight. Can be saved and re-used whenever you want to store your cable.

reviews.title: Great cable for a small investment.
reviews.text:
Being new to to the Mechanical Keyboard market, I recently purchased a prebuilt "budget" board that came with a long plain usb-c cable, which would be fine but I wanted a cleaner look for my desk. Aviator cables are great but I did not want to invest $50+ for a single use cable. In comes Asceny with a cable that costs half as much and looks just as good in my opinion. The packaging was nicely made, and does not feel cheap in any way, this company really put a lot of love into the product.

My only complaint is that with the direction of the coil, I can not have the Asceny logo facing up with a left side charge port on my keyboard, otherwise the cable does not sit correctly on the desk. This would not dissuade me from recommending it though, and may even encourage some buyers.

reviews.title: Keychron K4 Compatible
reviews.text:
Read reviews about the plug not fitting on some Keychrons but was prepared to modify. Turns out, it fits just fine, and I haven’t had any issues so far.
Cable itself feels solid and durable, a bit stiff, but maneuverable.
Overall, for the price, I’d say go with it if you are debating.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Good value, sturdy, nice style

reviews.title: Good starter coil cable for keyboard build
reviews.text: This is my first coil keyboard cable for my first mechanical keyboard build. I can’t compare it to one of the more popular brands like Glorious for example, but for what it is, it’s a nice, sturdy, well made cable. It looks good and is a nice accessory for my keyboard. The coils are actually smaller than I thought they would be, but still nice. I wish the cable was longer though, that’s my only complaint.

reviews.title: good wire to save space and for the *aesthetic*
reviews.text: i love how the coiled-wire pairs with the mechanical keyboard. it makes my desk look less messy and looks fab LOL

reviews.text: I purchased these for my Das Keyboard Model S (Mac). All of the keys fit, including the spacebar, and they are much higher quality than the Das OEM keys. They feel more substantial, and the sound of the keyboard is a little different, the clacking is lower pitched.

reviews.title: Really good keycaps, using on my custom mech.
reviews.text: I would give 5 stars, but one of the keys came broken from shipping. Luckily I bought for a 60key, so I didn't need that specific one.

reviews.title: Shine through is very disappointing
reviews.text: I got these primarily because I liked the orange and black color scheme and the advertised shine through features but the backlit brightness is only fair to poor on these (I'm being generous giving it 3 stars, I think).  Even the cheap $6.00 keycap set ($0.38 after discounts) with a similar color scheme I got from aliexpress is brighter than these.  However, since I need those 1u-sized right Alt, FN and Ctrl keycaps for my Royal Kludge RK96 90% keyboard, I'm not returning therm, though I basically paid $20 for those 3 keycaps :/

reviews.title: Great Keycaps for the price!!
reviews.text: When these keycaps came in I wasn't expecting a whole lot because of the price but surprisingly they're actually pretty nice. Usually on cheaper sets like this the legending and print quality can vary quite a bit but these keycaps were really consistent and is on par with some other sets I've had that cost twice as much so that was nice to see. Overall they're pretty great for the price and I honestly recommend them if you if you're looking for "designer" style keycaps.

reviews.title: Beautiful keycaps for designers!
reviews.text: These keycaps are beautiful! I use photoshop often so I already have the shortcuts memorized but having these keycaps are just so nice regardless. They feel really nice and thick, the printing on them is nice and clear, and I love the color way for them. I dont use this board often even when working in photoshop and really just use this board and keycap set as a decorative piece to add to my collection of keyboards. I love these keycaps!!

title: Alkem Mechanical Gaming Keyboard with 26 Rainbow Backlits Silver Retro Typewriter Keyboard Full-Size 104 Keys USB Wired Mechanical Keyboard Blue Switch Ergonomic Keyboard Brushed Alloy Panel

Laser engraving technology ensures that the characters will not fade. Innovative structure of all key mechanical green axis design to meet the actual needs of professional players.

reviews.title: GREAT KEYBOARD
reviews.text: I absolutely 💯 LOVE this keyboard especially how it lights up!!!! GREAT PRODUCT!!! 💯

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY
reviews.text: This is NOT an rgb keyboard. The only people who will be happy with this are people who want a rainbow colored keyboard. Yes, there are different color modes, but you CANT set it to one color. I am so dissapointed with this keyboard because I was really excited to try out the typewriter style keys, will definitely be returning and getting an ACTUAL rgb customizable keyboard.

【Excellent Craftsmanship】Using injection molding technology, waterproof and dustproof design, easy to clean up dirt. Floating keycap design, uniform light transmission, making the lighting effect obvious.

【Warm Tips】Keycaps only, The keyboard in the picture is only for the demo and is not for sale.

reviews.title: Looks great, types great
reviews.text:
The caps are thick and wide so typing on them is a pleasure. I also love the oriental graphics of ocean waves and whales. The only gripe would be the packaging box is a bit robust in need of better designs and material. Otherwise, this is a great product. Oh also better font selection would be better too, especially the non-capitalized letters on the pause vs page up vs page down vs delete vs insert buttons. They seem inconsistent.

I would pay an extra $5 if this keycap set supports 65% or 68% design.

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.text:
Overall it's a decent set and a good value. However, I noticed a number of stains on the keys, incorrect legends (the n in the End key), reversed prints (colon/semicolon and apostrophe/quotation were swapped), and misaligned legends (the F9 is not in line with the other F keys).

I would probably not buy from this seller or manufacturer again due to this.

reviews.title: Not great
reviews.text: My son got it for gaming and we returned it after one day because the keys were sticking. That’s clearly not ideal for a gamer.

Details

Cherry switches
Cherry MX Black: Linear Switch,Actuation Force is 60cN
Cherry MX Red: Linear Switch,Actuation Force is 45cN
Cherry MX Pink: A quieter edition of cherry red,called Cherry pink as usual
Cherry MX Blue: Tactile and Clicky Switch,Actuation Force is 50cN

2 pin 4 pin switch plug led can't be used directly with this switches.
features: This link is only the shaft and switches for mechanical keyboard,no keyboard and switch tester included.
Pls note: This switches can be used with PCB smd led,such as GK61 GK64 mechanical edition.
GK61 optical keyboard can't use it.Optical keyboard need optical switches
2 pin 4 pin switch led can't be used directly with this switches,such as 2x3x4 and 3mm and 1.8mm leds
SMD switches uses together with SMD RGB PCB,the effect is much better than normal switches
Note: During the delivery process, the pins of the switch may touch and bend. This is inevitable. The bent pin can be straightened with nail clippers, which will not affect normal use.

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Nice keyboard!!
reviews.text:
Updated review.. The mouse quit working after about 12 hours of use. This is disappointing because when it worked it was nice and responsive and was comfortable. When I left the original review everything worked fine..

This keyboard looks and works good. The back lighting makes it easy to see in the dark and the keys are precise and feel good while typing. The real aluminum frame is sturdy and looks good too. The phone holder is a nice touch. I would say it's worth it for the price.

title: VELOCIFIRE Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboard Mini, 78-Key Compact Ergonomic, Outemu Brown Switches Backlit and Double-Shot ABS Keycaps for Copywriter, Typist and Programmer
features: MUST HAVE- Velocifire mechanical keyboard is designed for copywriter, programmer, editors who spend many hours typing every day. You will get better at typing speed and accuracy through Velocifire mechanical keyboards.

Durable Brown Switch- Low-noise switches have a tactile bump for feedback with every key-press. It is much QUIETER than Blue Switch but LOUDER than a regular Membrane keyboard. If you never used a mechanical keyboard before, please think about whether you can accept its sound first.

Compact Design- The compact mechanical keyboard helps save desktop space.Tiny size of compact keyboard makes it possible to share room with a mouse. Users like to have to mouse close to keyboard, since that will be easier to reach.It also serves as a accessory of laptop.

ANTI-GHOSTING - This is sometime used in place of Key Rollover, but the terminology is incorrect since ghosting is a different (and rare) issue. You will need to do more research to see what key rollover technology is being used. Ghosting is when two or more keys are pressed and a key that was not pressed registers instead.
Money Back -- Velocifire offers a 30 days money back. We always serve you after the sale!

reviews.title: The way to go
reviews.text: My son needed it in the worst way 4 his failing laptop. It's been excellent in every way... gaming, etc. He loves it. Truly a lifesaver.

reviews.title: Good keyboard
reviews.text: It's good for the price until you can afford something better.

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: ok

reviews.title: Huge bargain, but the layout is not right
reviews.text:
This keyboard is a huge bargain, but the layout is not right. The bottom third and fourth rows don't match what you'd expect from a keyboard.

If you don't touch-type, then this keyboard is great. If you do, it's not so great.

reviews.title: Sounds horrendous
reviews.text: So I should start off to say the build quality is good and the switches are nice. My complaint is the noise that is made when bottoming the keys out on the aluminum top. It makes a loud and high pitched ringing noise that is far from pleasant. The small form factor would make it great for gaming however the sound when hitting the keys are is not good. Ultimately it could have been a nice keyboard but it fell short.

reviews.title: Great for the look, 10 key A plus, Functional enough for device swap
reviews.text:
I really wanted this keyboard for the typewriter look, device swap, and 10-key.

The only setback is that even when plugged in via USB to the main device when waking up there is a few seconds of buffering time before being able to type at times. At first, it drove me crazy but now I notice that the green light signals when this is happening and goes solid when ready which alleviates the "let's go" anxiety because I know what's happening. I love that it pairs to 3 devices. 2 via Bluetooth and one via usb.

Another weird thing is maybe at least 1 time a week I have to unplug and plug the keyboard back in when I cannot type on my device and I know that the correct device is selected and the solid green light is on. If there were a better typewriter-style keyboard in all black and chrome with 10-key and pairs to at least 3 devices that don't have the buffering when swapping device or intermittent typing issue, I would have picked it but it doesn't exist.

Overall 4 stars.

Update:

Key caps are already falling apart after 3 months use! My heart is so heavy it’s so noticeable and I cannot find a replacement key hundreds of dollars down the drain.

reviews.title: Keys are dim
reviews.text: I sent mine back because I couldnt see the keys when I was 2 feet away. The backlight shines more between the keys than through them. It was ok in a very dark room but a dim indoor setting they were impossible to see unless you were right over the keyboard, even with the light turned all the way up. They were also kind of wobbly, cant see anyone typing fast on this. I bought a querty writer and the quality difference is huge.

reviews.title: Love the retro feel and "noise"
reviews.text: Love the retro feel and clacking noise.  Typing accuracy has improved!  The ability to switch between 3 devices is extremely convenient!

title: MELETRIX WS Grey Tactile Mechanical Keyboard Lubed Switches(35pcs)
description: WS Grey Tactile Mechanical Keyboard Lubed Switches
features: Nylon Top and bottom housing, POM silent tactile stem
Double stage spring: 63.5g
Total travel: 3.50±0.3mm Pre-travel: 2.00±0.5mm Bottom-out force: 63.5
Factory lubed

reviews.title: Can be used stock!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:528307786b36a4c2c9833ddd389101cb]] They come with a small amount of lube pre applied. Usually, prelubed switches are inconsistent in my experience but these ones are really good. I decided to not lube them at all. EDIT: got a few more batches, they're not as consistent. But seller was nice enough to get them replaced.

The stems are long pole. As a result, it has a nice bottom out sound.

It was noticeably heavier coming from a 50g switch to these that are 63g, but overtime I got adjusted and had no problems typing with them.

Overall a great buy, though I wish it was priced more competitively.

Using on Drop Preonic with MT3 Camillo, plateless, tape mod

reviews.title: Nice linears
reviews.text:
Starting off not sure who's at fault for this as it's only fulfilled by Amazon but one of my bags was missing a few switches (one bag was open and all the switches were rattling around inside the amazon pouch it arrived in) I counted 5 missing and there wasn't a silica gel packet either, the other bags were fine.
complaint aside they feel really nice and the factory lube seems to be well done as wish they had a "3 pin" option and different switch amounts 35 2 is too few and 3 is too many (unless some get lost in transit like mine lol) 90 would be a good option for the TKL/75% gang

reviews.title: Will be Using Right Away
reviews.text: In building & repairing computers these key switches are used very often. Mainly for high-end (over $100) keyboards that the serious gamers use. What they do is tough on the keyboards and often switches break or become less responsive which may lead to a gamer losing a match. These snap right in to the sockets and can instantly rebuild the whole keyboard like new. I realize they would not be used by your everyday person or casual gamer but when it gets serious they are  the switches to be used.

reviews.title: Nice Linear
reviews.text: These are nice and smooth and sound wonderful.  I'm not a linear fan usually, but I do like them in my modifier keys (shift, backspace, enter, and space) because I don't like the return sound a tactile makes while in a larger key.  These are perfect for that as they don't have a high pitch and there's no spring ping to even think of!  I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for a lighter-weight linear switch with some style.

reviews.title: Great Stock!
reviews.text: The switches sounds great and feels good to use. The lube in this is not bad at all and you don't hear any ping or scratchiness. The bottom out is much more than I am used to, but I do enjoy it otherwise.

title: Akko Keycaps Top Printed Shine-Through with ASA Profile, White Keycaps PBT Double-Shot Keycaps for Mechanical Keyboards
features: SHINE-THROUGH KEYCAPS – Deliver premium and shining RGB experiences with Akko ASA Shine-through keycap sets! Come with extremely durable and resistant double-shot Shine-through keycaps, the legend shine through keycaps brings unique and great RGB effects.

ULTIMATE CUSTOMIZATION FLEXIBILITY – Comes with Akko ASA profile, the keycap set is suitable for a variety of layouts including 61-key(60%), 64-key, 68-key (65%), 84-key (75%), 87-key (TKL), 98-Key (Classic 1800), 100-Key (96%), Alice and full 108-key size, and thus offers strong flexibility for keyboard personalization.

ASA PROFILE – Akko’s proprietary ASA profile is tailored to offer a more familiar and comfortable typing experience by matching the height for OEM profile while maintaining the aesthetics and spheric top of the classic SA profile.
PBT DOUBLE-SHOT – Double-shot keycaps are extremely durable and resistant to wear even for decades, and the legends are particularly vibrant, sharp with high contrast.

FOR MX STRUCTURE SWITCHES – Compatible with MX structure mechanical switches and mainstream keyboards including but not limited to Cherry, Gateron, Akko and Kailh. Large keys of non-standard layout & stabilizers may not be compatible.

reviews.title: Not the brightest shine-through, but for the material and price it's worth it.
reviews.text:
Akko's ASA profile is a taller profile kind of like SA. Feels great to type on and is fine for gaming if you don't mind the extra travel time on each keystroke. The finish on these has a great texture and it's PBT so it shouldn't wear out quickly. "Shouldn't" being relative since I tend to shred keycaps as though my fingers were first dipped in acid before typing.

30.00 for keycaps of this quality and for the number of keys is great especially in a hobby where everything is over priced, over hyped, and overly bogged down in group buys and pre-orders that take literal years to fulfill.

reviews.title: Shine-Through keycaps, look amazing
reviews.text: These shine-through keycaps look awesome.  They are super easy to install, like most keycaps.  It is just a bit time consuming.  I love being able to change out keys and switches and seem to collect keycaps.  These are great and sound and feel amazing.

title: 4-Port HDMI KVM Switch – 4K 60Hz – QHD 144Hz - Audio Output and USB Sharing – Mechanical & Gaming Keyboards Supported – HKS0401A2U
description:
This 4x1 HDMI KVM Switch allows you to share one set of “keyboard, video monitor, and mouse” (“KVM”) with up to four PC’s or video devices (Xbox, PS4, Firestick, etc). The switcher does not require software and works with Windows, MacOS, Unix/Linux, Raspberri Pi, etc. HDMI 2.0 protocol supports 4K@60hz and blazing 144hz@1440P, making this device a perfect fit for work-from-home professionals and high-end video gaming.
Key Features
- Supports DisplayPort, DVI, & VGA with approved adapters.  - Keyboard passthrough mode allows for better compatibility plus multimedia key functions  - Hotkey triggers assignable to either Scroll Lock or Right-CTRL  - USB sharing works with printers, jump drives, USB headsets and webcams for teleconferencing.  - Auto-scanning with adjustable time interval from 1 to 250 seconds.  - 1-year US-based warranty when purchased from BuyTESmart
FAQ
- Audio is transmitted via HDMI connection. HDMI or DisplayPort monitor required for audio  - Use powered USB hub to expand the USB2.0 port if multiple connections are needed  - Use USB extender to reduce distance to receiver if wireless mouse/keyboard is “jumpy”  - Please install CR2025 battery before use (battery not included)
Mouse / Keyboard Compatibility
Dedicated mouse & keyboard ports have emulation programming. Second gen chipsets have “Passthrough Mode” to send special characters such as multimedia keys (play, pause, volume up/down), which improves keyboard compatibility. Keyboard software such as Logitech Options, Corsair iCUE, etc conflicts with the emulation and limits the ability to use macro keys. We recommend using the KVM’s USB2.0 port as a workaround if this software if needed. USB2.0 port does not have emulation programming and KVM will not recognize hotkey commands. Please use a powered USB hub to expand USB connectivity.
features: Share 4 computers with 1 monitor, keyboard, mouse. Switch between PC’s with push button, keyboard hotkeys, mouse gestures, or remote control. Can also use as HDMI switch for gaming consoles and streaming devices.
HDMI 2.0 supports UHD 4K60hz (3840x2160), QHD 144hz (2560x1440), 1080P 144hz (1920x1080). Plus Ultrawide 60hz (21:9 & 32:9). HDCP 2.2, HDR10, Dolby Vision. EDID Emulation.
Plug & Play. No software or drivers needed. Supported by IT departments for work-from-home professionals. Separate your work from your personal life without the hassle & clutter!
Transmit audio to monitor via HDMI and/or external speakers via stereo output. Share USB device such as webcam and headset with dedicated USB2.0 port. Great for Zoom and Twitch users.
Supports wired, wireless, mechanical, multimedia, and gaming keyboards. No delay, zero latency keyboard switching and pass-through mode for multimedia keys. READ FAQ & PICS.
U.S. Based TECHNICAL SUPPORT from BuyTESmart available to help resolve all issues.

reviews.title: Mostly good
reviews.text: One of my connected PCs has a hard time getting the resolution to 1440, cannot figure out why.  I have to restart to get it to go from 1080 to 1440.

reviews.title: Great KVM switch
reviews.text: I wasn’t sure what to expect , but after having it for a week I really like the switch.  Perfect size and functionality.

title: Doohoeek Updated Retro Typewriter Keyboard with White Lighting, Muti-Device Multi-OS Bluetooth & Wired Mechanical Keyboard for Laptops, Vintage Keyboard with Cradle for Mac OS/iOS/Windows/Android
features: New Version for More Flexibility: The 2022 updated typewriter keyboard is compatible with more operating system (MacOS and iOS) and also simplify the connectivity and switch process with easy connect switch button.

Retro Typewriter Style Design: The wood finished surface, retro round keys and typewriter-like looks provide good balance between functional keyboard and vintage decoration. Best decors and functional keyboard for your office or home setups.

Multi-OS with Easy Switch Button: The keyboard is compatible with Mac OS, iOS, Windows and Android operating system and only simply tap on the switch button at the top right corner to change the configiration.

Pair up to 4 Devices with Seamless Switch: The keyboard supports 3 Bluetooth and 1 wired connectivity. Only simply press switch button at the top right corner to switch between Bluetooth and wired mode. (For more details about Bluetooth connectivity please scroll down to product description)
Responsive and Fluid Keystrokes for Heavy Users: All key anti-ghosting and lifespan of over 50 million clicks provide fluid and responsive typing experience for writers, gamers, coders, etc.

Beautiful White Lighting Effects: The various lighting effects allow you to type day or night while decorating your desktop setups . Only need to fiddle with the “return” bar and left-hand knob to change lighting effects and its brightness.

Long Lasting Battery: With 2000mah rechargeable battery only about 6 hours charging the keyboard has 16-hour continuouse working time (backlighting on). Note: Working time may vary based on use and computer conditions.

What You Get: 1 x Retro Typewriter Keyboard, 2 x Blue Switch, 1 x Metal Switch Puller, 1 x USB-C Cable for Charging/Connection, 1 x User Manual; 12-month warranty & a ready support team for any issues.

reviews.title: LOVE IT
reviews.text: I absolutely 💯 ♥️ love this keyboard! It reminds me of typing class in high school. If you want nostalgia this is your product. It does make a very satisfying loud clicking when typing so do not buy if you need something quiet. Now my sister wants one too!

reviews.title: I am in love
reviews.text: I never thought I can fall in love with a keyboard! This keyboard is esthetically beautiful. I love this clicking sound…not quite like the real typewriter but kinda close:)  Light effects make typing even more fun

reviews.title: Beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: The keyboard is absolutely unique and stunning, I just received it yesterday so I have not typed on it very much but it seems pretty heavy duty and the back lighting is awesome especially with bad eyesight, The return arm regulates the lights to make it very smooth to adjust, The typewriter knobs actually do the volume on your computer so all in all I do love the keyboard, The wireless feature actually was pretty easy to set up just read the instructions carefully!  I have never spent more than $40 on a keyboard and wireless mouse but I have to tell you well worth it.

reviews.title: nice build. aesthetically interesting looking.
reviews.text: I tried to return this thinking it has connectivity issues but troubleshot my way to realize it was OS messin' with me.  Glad I gave it a another whirl because it's really nice!  one thing it does do is the lower keys next to the space button are all the same height and my fat lower palm always hits them and sends me to the beginning of the sentence I'm writing.  Annoying and somewhat dangerous for my line of work but I solved it by putting elevation risers at the front raising it approximately another 8-10 degrees.  Would have been nice if it had elevation standoffs as standard equipment.  bluetooth on this is fantastic and responsive.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text: The middle post is made of solid metal, which isnt bad... but depending on the location of the LED under the key, the solid post can hinder the light from being spread evenly as seen in the picture I uploaded. Kinda wish the middle post was clear for better light distribution. Other than that its great. Mostly solid metal, so its quite heavy.

reviews.title: So cute
reviews.text: My husband bought this by accident when building my computer. Before it arrived I was going to return it but then it came. I love it. The pad part is squishy and it fits my keyboard. So cute!

reviews.title: Works great.
reviews.text: Super cute

title: Kraken Coiled Keyboard Cable - Artisan Coiled USB C Cable with Aviator Connector for Mechanical Gaming Keyboards (Pure White)
features: Premium Artisan Designs in colors to fit every gaming setup!
Heavy Duty 5 Pin Aviator Connector (Easy to connect, and looks AMAZING)
Double Sleeved for enhanced looks and durability!
5 Feet long to reach your keyboard anywhere in your setup

reviews.title: Excellent quality cable and connectors, but color is more purple than blue
reviews.text:
Update: Oddly enough, this did not work with a Drop Alt keyboard. It worked with a few other keyboards just fine though. Just a word of warning for anyone pairing this cable with a Drop Alt (or maybe any other Drop keyboard).

This is the third coiled cable I have ordered, and it's definitely the best quality overall. The cable itself is thick and good quality. The coil is a bit firm, but nothing too unusual. The intermediate connector is all metal and heavy. Both sides of the intermediate connector can be unthreaded: The side going to the USB-C connector, and the side going to the USB connector.

One interesting thing I noticed was that the end connectors have a color matched almost shrink wrap thickness strain protection around them. The USB side is the most noticeable, and the USB-C side is a bit thicker. As long as there is enough strain protection, I actually prefer the less bulky end connections.

The only nit is the color. Even though it looked dark purplish in the product listing, I was hoping that it would be more blue in real life. It's not, it's an attractive dark purple. I would assume the color represented in the product listing is accurate, in case you're wondering if there is any color variation from the listing photos to real life.

title: dagaladoo XVX 189 Keys Double Shot Keycaps, PBT Custom Keyboard Keycaps Full Set, XVX Profile Keycaps for 60% 65% 70% 100% Cherry Gateron MX Switches Mechanical Keyboard, Black/Purple
features: Full 189 keys PBT keycaps set, including 108 standard keys, 61 supplementary keys and 20 invert color supplementary keys for most 61/64/66/68/84/87/96/98/100/104/108 mechanical keyboards.
Double shot design keycaps, made from two colors material molded into each others, make the keycaps characters maintain the vibrance and saturation, clear and not fade.
XVX profile keycaps, ergonomic height design similar than Cherry profile, while increasing the contact surface between the finger and keycaps, bring you a comfortable typing experience.
Made from high content PBT material, 0.2cm extra-thick keycaps wall, which is provide top-notch durability, excellent touch and grease resistance.
Minimalist theme style and classic color matching, with a large number of personalized complement keys, you can DIY different styles of keyboards according to your own ideas.

reviews.title: Fits Royal Kludge 90% and Keychron K10!
reviews.text: I like all the extras. The quality of the PBT is grainy in texture, so if that's the kind of thing you're in to, then these won't disappoint. Not shine through, although the advertisement never claims they are. No light is coming through these from your board. The XVX profile is nice. Many extra key options- this set has fit several boards from several brands- not something you see for the price point! Quality printing and nice font on the caps. The keys feel good to type on when used with a clicky or linear switch. They are a bit heavy, so a lighter switch wouldn't be a bad option. I don't like to use these on tactile switches due to the mushy that these caps add to the keys. O Rings did not help these keys IMO.

reviews.title: Random assortment of loose keys
reviews.text: Expected a full set of keycaps, instead received a box containing three bags of loose keys, missing multiple letters, numbers, function keys, etc. Might be good for a concept art project, but not for a working keyboard.

reviews.title: Some keys misaligned with switch stems.
reviews.text: The keys have a nice touch, sound and printing however some keys, particularly my "O" key are a misaligned with the switch stem causing it to stick up a little higher than the "I" and "P" on either side. I did not mistake a "0" for an "O".

reviews.title: Seem to be good quality, but I hate the XVX profile
reviews.text:
These seems to be good quality keycaps, I have no issues with them at all. I have put them on multiple boards now, and I haven't had any break or scratch. Colors are accurate and legends are clear. No complaints there.

My one gripe is the XVX profile. It takes a lot of getting used to (like any new profile would), but the surface area of the keys is much larger than most other profiles. Therefore, when typing, it feels as if your fingers have to travel significantly further to reach the next key. It also makes it much, much easier to fat finger extra keys. If I had realized how much more surface area there was, I would not have purchased these. However, they do look great, they were cheap, and they sound pretty good too.

reviews.title: Great keycaps, andd even better customer service!
reviews.text: I wanted to find some PBT keycaps that were double-shot and gave some aesthetic flair to my $15 108 full sized mech keyboard with brown switches.  They fit just fine, and give a different, yet, pleasing sounds and feel to the keyboard.  I wanted non-see through keycaps in order to hide most of the LED rainbow glare.  The backlit effect is, again, very pleasing.  The keycap set that I originally ordered was missing the F9 key.  I contacted their customer service through Amazon, and got a reply back right away and arranged for a replacement set to be shipped out.  Got it the new set the day after, and it was complete.  Will purchase from this seller again whenever I need/want new keycaps.  Very confident if something is wrong, will be taken care of in a timely matter.

Fully programmable via hardware: program macros and keymaps over four layers
No obnoxious branding with programmable RGB indicator lights
Slim case design w/multi-channel cable routing system and detachable USB cable

reviews.title: Buy it
reviews.text:
If you use a keyboard 8 hours a day, make it count. Use a keyboard that you enjoy.
The Code keyboard is one of my favorites. The clear switches make it so you have a great feel - but don’t annoy your coworkers.

The paint work is really good quality for how little they’re asking. The same thing can be found on other sites but more expensive than it on Amazon. Genuine 10/10 from me and highly recommend it.

title: EPOMAKER Mix 1.8m Coiled Type-C to USB A TPU Mechanical Keyboard Space Cable with Detachable Aviator Connector for Gaming Keyboard and Cellphone(Grey)
features: 【Epomaker MIX Cable For Keyboards and More】Ideas coming from our community, Epomaker custom MIX cable is designed to matches your keyboard, no matter what type of setup you’re working with. Choose from our different color options, it comes easy for you to match your keyboard and top off your setup. 【Durable and Flexible】Epomaker custom MIX cable is durable and flexible due to the strict selection of the durable techflex and PP double-sleeves raw materials. The coiled design enables the cables easily to integrate into a wide range of spaces

【Various Colors Choices】The cable is designed in various vivid colors to match different keyboard trend. Epomaker custom MIX cable is dedicated to adding more vibrant energy to your daily life and work. Solid color, contrast colors, or one with various colors like a rainbow? It is up to you! Get one to match your keyboard right away!

reviews.title: That's not what I expected
reviews.text: The cable does not have the diameter of the expected coils and the aviator connector is not of good quality. I don't think it will last long.

reviews.title: Nice looking and a great add for keyboard enthusiasts!
reviews.text:
Do you need a cable with an aviator connection? No, but do you want one? Yes! I like the mesh sleave on the cable, that gives a premium look and a perceived ruggedness. I chose the grey so whatever keyboard I hook up (or any USB-c peripheral) it looks nice.

Only ding I would give it is that if the keyboard needs to be to the left the cable off the coils is on top and does not look as nice. If the cable is oriented to the right, it looks better. I don't have any major issues here, but it is something that shoudl be in the product description maybe.

Overall, really nice and glad I bought it!
